## [00:00 - 00:25]

The quality close. Hey, I know it's more money than you considered, and I would expect that this is the same thing that happens to you when you buy other products. It is obvious that you're a person who exemplifies quality, buys quality, lives in quality, wears quality, and knows that quality goods cost more than other products. Look, let's get this done now so you can start enjoying the quality of this product.
